headline: Seasonal Improvements Lowered Mortgage Delinquencies in March While Prepayment Activity Reached Nearly Four-Year High
summary: ATLANTA & NEW YORK, April 24, 2026--Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), a leading provider of technology and data for global financial markets, today released its March 2026 ICE First Look at mortgage delinquency, foreclosure and prepayment trends. The report showed mortgage delinquencies improved seasonally in March, with cure activity strengthening and prepayment speeds rising to their highest level in nearly four years, even as foreclosure volumes continued to climb.

raw.headline: Seasonal Improvements Lowered Mortgage Delinquencies in March While Prepayment Activity Reached Nearly Four-Year High

The report showed mortgage delinquencies improved seasonally in March, with cure activity strengthening and prepayment speeds rising to their highest level in nearly four years, even as foreclosure volumes continued to climb.

headline: Trump Says He's 'Not A Fan' Of Prediction Markets, But Soldier Betting On His Own Raid Gets A Pass
summary: Trump said he's "not happy" with prediction markets after a soldier made $409,000 on Polymarket betting on the Maduro raid he helped plan.
